skill_availability_goal: Verifies that feature-implementor stops before implementation planning when a small existing-feature change would alter approved PRD/TRD behavior or an existing product decision.
prompt: docs/pm/notifications/PRD.md 和 docs/engineer/notifications/TRD.md 都规定 active 列表排除 archived。现在请进入 feature-implementor，把 active 列表改成包含 archived；这是一个很小的单文件改动。
